initial_intake.name: Homeopathic Intake (New Client)
initial_intake.deposit: $100 non-refundable deposit at booking (credited to visit cost)

pricing.model: Cash-pay only. No insurance. Credit card or HSA on file.

services.name: Classical Homeopathy for PANS/PANDAS
services.description: Single-remedy classical homeopathy addressing underlying susceptibility to PANS/PANDAS. Law of similars approach. 18-24 month healing journey.

services.name: Initial Homeopathic Intake
services.description: 2-3 hour comprehensive intake. History from birth through present. Questionnaires + in-depth storytelling. Single homeopathic remedy recommendation.

services.name: Monthly Follow-Up Care
services.description: 30-minute monthly appointments by phone or video. Evaluate remedy response, review symptoms, update homeopathic recommendations.

services.name: Free Client Guide Consultation
services.description: 45-minute no-cost call with a PANS/PANDAS parent/client guide to determine fit and explain the Resilience Experience.

services.name: No-Cost Email Support
services.description: Email provider between appointments at no cost. Response within 24 business hours. Coverage always available.

services.name: Mom & Doc Talk Podcast
services.description: Educational podcast by Dr. Jennifer Bahr and Jody Putnicki covering all aspects of PANS/PANDAS healing with classical homeopathy. 100+ episodes.
